name: A Different Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Pour the shortening into a 10-inch cast-iron skillet and place it in the hot oven.
3. In a bowl, mix the self-rising cornmeal or mix with the milk and beaten egg.
4. Add the fennel seed and pepper, then stir until thoroughly blended.
5. Stir in the hot shortening, then pour the batter into the hot skillet.
6. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until done. Serve piping hot with butter.
Yield: One 10-inch round
